concepts.title: Field extensions and automorphisms
concepts.blurb: Splitting fields and automorphism groups link polynomial equations to symmetry.

concepts.title: Fundamental theorem of Galois theory
concepts.blurb: Intermediate fields correspond contravariantly to subgroups of the Galois group.

concepts.title: Solvability by radicals
concepts.blurb: Group-theoretic solvability explains why general quintics resist radical formulas.
